data.description: 1.10.0, the release of the Texture Update and the third experimental release for Village & Pillage, is a major update to Bedrock Edition released on March 19, 2019. It adds some more features of Village & Pillage that were not added in either 1.8.0 or 1.9.0, such as shields, pillager outposts, new types of villagers, new textures and more.
